claim: A deterministic builder can generate transition proposal and replay index from available records with explicit WARN fallback.
basis: Builder requirement mandates safe sample fallback and explicit missing input markers.
risk: Missing sources could be silently fabricated.

claim: Validator can enforce bounded no-fake-green acceptance and evidence/report completeness.

risk: Weak validator could pass incomplete or unsafe outputs.
proof_plan: Implement dedicated validator with deterministic checks and BLOCKED/PASS_WITH_WARNINGS/PASS verdict mapping.
